details.emptyStops: This route doesn't have linked stops in the heritage_sites table yet.
details.mapsOpenErrorBody: Try again or open your maps app manually to follow this route.
details.mapsTruncatedBody: Your maps app can only open the first {{count}} stops in this route. You can continue with the rest manually.
details.mapsUnavailable: This route doesn't have the stop order or coordinates needed to open navigation yet.
details.notFoundCopy: We couldn't load this route. Go back to the list and try again.
details.retryCopy: Check your connection and try again to reload this route.

fallbackDescription: This route doesn't have a description yet.
footerCopy: These routes are a starting guide. You can use them as a base and adapt them with what you find on the map.
heroCopy: A quick selection for when you want to open TourIn and head out without planning from scratch.

list.emptyCopy: Once you add routes, they'll show up here with their linked stops.
list.retryCopy: Check your connection and try again to view the suggested routes.

noTags: This route doesn't have highlighted tags yet.
